1px 0px 0px solid none none rgb(43, 47, 49) rgb(0, 0, 0) rgb(0, 0, 0)

animations.name: fa-bounce
fa-bounce
fa-beat-fade
fa-beat-fade
fa-shake
fa-shake

rules.cssText: header .navigation { position: fixed; width: 100%; height: 100%; top: 0px; left: 0px; z-index: 9; background-color: var(--shades03); padding: 3.5rem 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transform: translate3d(0px, 100%, 0px); }
header .navigation .navigation-menu { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; margin-right: auto; gap: 1rem; padding-left: 1.5rem; }
header .navigation-menu .menu-item { display: block; padding: 0px; height: auto; width: 100%; text-align: left; font-size: 4.25rem; font-weight: 700; overflow: unset; }
header .navigation-menu .menu-item.active span::before { left: auto; right: -1rem; bottom: 0.5rem; width: 10px; height: 10px; }
.section-services .service-item .item-back { position: relative; clip-path: polygon(0px 0px, 100% 0px, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); top: auto; left: auto; height: 0px; }
.section-services .service-item .item-back .marquee-text { padding: 0px; height: 6.25rem; display: inline-flex; align-items: flex-start; top: 0px !important; }
.section-services .service-item .item-back .marquee-text span { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 6.25rem; }
footer .footer-information { padding: 0px 1rem 0px 0px; max-width: none; width: auto; }
footer .footer-bar { padding: 1rem 0px; border-top: 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--shades03); }
.section-clients .client-list .swiper-wrapper { justify-content: unset; align-items: unset; flex-wrap: unset; margin: unset; }
footer .footer-bar { padding: 1rem 0px; border-top: 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--shades03); }
.section-works .works .work-item-serial { font-size: 8rem; text-align: right; right: -1rem !important; left: auto !important; }
.project-media-grid-block .media-grid-row .media-grid-item { padding: 0px 0.75rem; height: auto; max-width: 100% !important; margin: 0px !important; width: calc(-1.5rem + 90vw) !important; }
.section-services-collaborate .services-collaborate-file { position: relative; transform: none; top: auto; padding: 0px; }
